title: update_space_fully doc misleads: Ok(false) not returned for member-only patches
description: The doc comment says Ok(false) if space does not exist, then qualifies it in a separate sentence as only applying when name/description are provided. A future maintainer calling update_space_fully with member_ops but no name/description and relying on Ok(false) for not-found detection will silently get Ok(true). The comment buries the caveat instead of making it prominent. Fix: promote the caveat to the first paragraph and add an assertion or existence check so the API is not ambiguous.
